properties.name: Failed Logins from Unknown or Invalid User

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Account {{actor_alternateId_s}} generated {{FailedLoginCount}} failed logins from IP {{client_ipAddress_s}} in the last 5 minutes.
alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Failed logins from unknown or invalid user: {{actor_alternateId_s}} from IP {{client_ipAddress_s}}

properties.description: This rule alerts when an unknown or invalid user generates more than 15 failed Okta management console login attempts from the same IP address within 5 minutes.
